commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `Array.isArray` guards around export HTML content filtering and iteration paths and adds malformed-content regression tests.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +49. Total +52 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main directly filters and iterates `msg.content`/`result.content`, so persisted non-array values have a clear TypeError path. I did not run a live failing export in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated code repair is indicated; contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed to supply real behavior proof before merge.

target.title: fix(export-html): guard msg.content and result.content filter/iteration paths against non-array values
target.body:
Closes #88255

## Summary

Four call sites in `src/auto-reply/reply/export-html/template.js` called `.filter()` or iterated with `for...of` directly on `msg.content` or `result.content` without first checking `Array.isArray`. When a persisted transcript row carries a non-array content value (`null`, `undefined`, or any scalar), those paths throw `TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'filter')`.

Fixed sites (all in the same source template file):

1. `computeStats()` — `msg.content.filter(...)` stats path (assistant messages)
2. `renderEntry()` assistant branch — two `for (const block of msg.content)` render loops
3. `renderEntry()` user branch — `content.filter(...)` text extraction fallback for non-string content
4. `renderToolCall()` — `result.content.filter(...)` text and image accessors

All four sites normalized with `Array.isArray(x) ? x : []` (or equivalent ternary for user branch). Regression tests added for both assistant and user message cases.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** `computeStats()`, `renderEntry()` (both assistant and user branches), and `renderToolCall()` in the export HTML template crash with `TypeError: msg.content.filter is not a function` when a transcript message row has non-array content (null, undefined, or scalar).

**Real environment tested:** Linux x86_64, Node.js v22.22.0, commit `c5a78001e51a11b3602d5ab1a81c8b9a6be6d2c0`

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

Step 1 — run the regression test suite (exercises the actual `template.js` via Node.js vm context with real DOM parsing via linkedom):

```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/export-html/template.security.test.ts --reporter=verbose
```

Step 2 — run the export session test suite:

```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/commands-export-session.test.ts
```

**Evidence after fix:**

Template security test suite — verbose output showing both new malformed-content tests passing through the actual `renderTemplate` function (which loads `template.js` via `vm.runInContext` and parses result HTML with linkedom):

```
 RUN  v4.1.7 /path/to/openclaw

 ✓ export html sidebar trigger affordance > keeps the hamburger sidebar trigger accessible 87ms
 ✓ export html sidebar trigger affordance > lets the mobile hamburger display rule win the CSS cascade 2ms
 ✓ export html security hardening > escapes raw HTML from markdown blocks 217ms
 ✓ export html security hardening > escapes tree and header metadata fields 59ms
 ✓ export html security hardening > sanitizes image MIME types used in data URLs 11ms
 ✓ export html security hardening > flattens remote markdown images but keeps data-image markdown 12ms
 ✓ export html security hardening > flattens unsafe markdown links while preserving safe links 17ms
 ✓ export html security hardening > escapes entry.id in element id and data-entry-id attributes 14ms
 ✓ export html security hardening > copy-link round-trip: dataset.entryId matches raw entry.id after browser decoding 16ms
 ✓ export html security hardening > escapes markdown data-image attributes 13ms
 ✓ export html security hardening > does not crash when assistant message has non-array content 58ms
 ✓ export html security hardening > does not crash when user message has non-array non-string content 33ms

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  12 passed (12)
   Duration  1.27s
```

Export session tests:

```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  7 passed (7)
   Duration  2.18s
```

**Observed result after fix:** `renderTemplate` resolves without throwing for assistant messages with null/undefined/string/number content and for user messages with null/undefined/number content. `computeStats` accumulates 0 tool-call count for malformed assistant rows. User-message text renders empty (no crash) for non-string non-array content.

**What was not tested:** Live browser rendering of the exported HTML file and end-to-end export from a running OpenClaw session with malformed transcript rows on disk. The `renderTemplate` regression tests exercise the same `template.js` code paths via `vm.runInContext` with a real linkedom DOM, without requiring a headless browser.
target.author: alix-007
